arts.ttl: I understand why Liverpool fans were angry with me - I'm sorry about what I did

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool will aim to maintain their record-breaking start under new manager Arne Slot when they visit Crystal Palace on Saturday in the first game of the Premier League weekend. The Reds picked up their eighth win in nine games under the Dutchman on Wednesday as they saw off Bologna in the Champions League and can extend their lead at the top of England's top flight with victory at Selhurst Park.

arts.ttl: 'I'm so sad about what I did to Liverpool fans – I understand why they're angry with me'
arts.sum: Luis Suarez admitted his sadness over his actions during a Liverpool Champions League semi-final and could understand why supporters were anger with him

arts.ttl: Arne Slot has made Man Utd decision look foolish after quiet Liverpool plan that started months ago
arts.sum: This week's Blood Red looks at Liverpool's decision to appoint Arne Slot, six months after their first meeting and why those at Manchester United might now wish they would have rivalled the Reds for his signature
